description: see http://hl7.org/fhir/json.html#schema for information about the FHIR Json Schemas

Substance.description: A homogeneous material with a definite composition.

id.description: The logical id of the resource, as used in the URL for the resource.

status.description: A code to indicate if the substance is actively used.

category.description: A code that classifies the general type of substance.

code.description: A code (or set of codes) that identify this substance.

description.description: A description of the substance - its appearance, handling requirements, and other usage notes.

instance.description: Substance may be used to describe a kind of substance, or a specific package/container of the substance: an instance.

ingredient.description: A substance can be composed of other substances.

Substance_Instance.description: Substance may be used to describe a kind of substance, or a specific package/container of the substance: an instance.

expiry.description: When the substance is no longer valid to use.

Substance_Ingredient.description: A substance can be composed of other substances.

quantity.description: The amount of the ingredient in the substance.

substanceCodeableConcept.description: Another substance that is a component of this substance.

substanceReference.description: Another substance that is a component of this substance.
